# Renamerly

> Renamerly is a browser-based batch image renaming tool for e-commerce sellers. It transforms messy product image filenames (IMG_4821.jpg) into SEO-friendly, platform-ready names (red-wool-sweater-front.jpg) in seconds. All processing happens client-side — no uploads, no signup required for free usage.

## Who it's for

- Shopify, Etsy, and Amazon product sellers who need consistent image naming
- Product photographers delivering assets to clients
- E-commerce agencies managing catalogs across multiple stores
- Anyone batch-renaming photos with SKU + descriptor conventions

## Key features

- Batch rename up to 500+ product images per session (Pro; 20/session Free)
- Auto-iteration naming (SKU-descriptor-01.jpg, SKU-descriptor-02.jpg)
- Platform presets for Shopify, Etsy, Amazon naming conventions
- RAW file preview (CR2, NEF, ARW, DNG, ORF, RAF) and Pro conversion
- EXIF metadata editing (Pro)
- AI descriptor suggestions powered by image analysis (Pro)
- CSV manifest export mapping original → new filenames (Pro)
- Client-side processing — images never leave the user's browser
- ZIP export with bundled manifest

## Pricing

- **Free:** $0/month. 20 images per session. ZIP export. No signup required.
- **Pro:** $9/month. Unlimited images, unlimited saved projects, 10 templates, RAW processing, EXIF editing, AI suggestions, 30-day export history, priority support. 14-day money-back guarantee.

Pricing page: https://renamerly.com/pricing

## Core pages

- [Home](https://renamerly.com/): Product overview and primary CTA
- [Pricing](https://renamerly.com/pricing): Free vs. Pro comparison and FAQ
- [Workspace](https://renamerly.com/app): The actual renaming tool (no signup required to try)
- [Sign up](https://renamerly.com/signup): Create a free account to save projects
- [Sign in](https://renamerly.com/login): Existing users

## Common questions Renamerly answers

- How do I rename product images for Shopify?
- What's the best file naming convention for Etsy product photos?
- How do I batch rename images without losing EXIF data?
- What's an SEO-friendly image file name?
- How should I name product images for Amazon listings?
- Can I batch rename RAW camera files?
- What's the difference between Bulk Rename Utility and Renamerly?

## Made by

Build With Treez — https://buildwithtreez.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/build-with-treez/

- Twitter/X: https://twitter.com/buildwithtreez

## Technical

- Platform: Web (browser-based, no install)
- Works offline after initial load
- Privacy: images processed entirely client-side; never uploaded to a server
- Supported formats: JPG, PNG, WebP, TIFF, HEIC, and RAW (CR2, NEF, ARW, DNG, ORF, RAF)
